name: IRC_CONTINGENT_SUBMISSIONS
description: This table is used for storing Contingent Submissions details.

columns.Name: CONTINGENT_SUBMISSION_ID
columns.Comments: Primary Key of the table. System generated.

columns.Name: REQUISITION_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign key to IRC_REQUISITIONS_B table.

columns.Name: PERSON_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign key to IRC_CANDIDATES table.

columns.Name: TN_AGENCY_ID
columns.Comments: Stores the AGENCY_ID of the Agency

columns.Name: STEP_STATUS_CODE
columns.Comments: Stores Contingent Submission Workflow Step Code. The corresponding lookup type is ORA_IRC_CS_STEP_STATUS_TYPE

columns.Name: STEP_SUB_STATUS_CODE
columns.Comments: Stores Contingent Submission Workflow Secondary Step Code

columns.Name: PROJECTED_START_DATE
columns.Comments: Contingent Submission assignment Projected Start Date

columns.Name: PROJECTED_END_DATE
columns.Comments: Contingent Submission assignment Projected End Date

columns.Name: SYSTEM_PERSON_TYPE
columns.Comments: Person type of the job applicant when they applied for the job.

columns.Name: SUBMISSION_DATE
columns.Comments: Stores the date when this submission was submitted.

columns.Name: SUBM_LAST_MODIFIED_DATE
columns.Comments: Stores the last modified date for the Submission. This is updated even when the child entities of the Submission table are updated. This can be used by customers to export submissions which were updated after a certain date.

columns.Name: SUBMISSION_LANGUAGE_CODE
columns.Comments: Stores the language code for the submission

columns.Name: PROFILE_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign Key to profiles table HRT_PROFILES_B.

columns.Name: TN_AGENCY_NAME
columns.Comments: Stores the Agency Name of the Agency

columns.Name: TN_AGENT_ID
columns.Comments: Stores the TN_AGENT_ID of the Agency to which the agent belong.

columns.Name: TN_AGENT_NAME
columns.Comments: Stores the First Name and Last Name of the Agent

columns.Name: BILL_RATE
columns.Comments: Stores the Bill Rate value provided the agency while submitting the Contingent Application

columns.Name: BILL_FREQUENCY_CODE
columns.Comments: Stores the Bill Frequency value provided the agency while submitting the Contingent Application

columns.Name: BILL_CURRENCY_CODE
columns.Comments: Stores  the Bill Currency Code value provided the agency while submitting the Contingent Application

columns.Name: DUPLICATE_RESOLVED_FLAG
columns.Comments: Indicates if there was a duplicate resolution

columns.Name: SUBMITTED_PERSON_ID
columns.Comments: Stores the Original Person Id value when the application was created

columns.Name: REF_CONT_SUBMISSION_ID
columns.Comments: Stores Reference Contingent  Submission Id

columns.Name: AGENCY_PROVIDED_URL
columns.Comments: Stores the  Reference URL value provided by the agency while submitting the Contingent Application

columns.Name: AGENCY_REFERENCE_ID
columns.Comments: Stores the Reference Id value provided by the agency while submitting the Contingent Application

columns.Name: HANDOVER_ASSIGNMENT_ID
columns.Comments: Unique identifier of the newly created work relationship assignment(PWK/CWK). Foreign key to PER_ALL_ASSIGNMENTS_M table.

columns.Name: CONVERTED_ASSIGNMENT_ID
columns.Comments: Unique identifier of the newly created work relationship assignment when PWK is converted to CWK. Foreign key to PER_ALL_ASSIGNMENTS_M table

columns.Name: HR_SYNC_SCENARIO
columns.Comments: Value identifying HR processing scenario of the Contingent Application. Ex Scenario 1 - Net New Hir, Scenario 2 - Returning Ex worker etc.

columns.Name: COMMENTS
columns.Comments: Stores the agency provided comments for the Contingent Application

columns.Name: OBJECT_STATUS
columns.Comments: Indicates the status of the object.

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.
